issues_found: Source is a listing/navigation page (source_type: listing_page), which per CORE RULE 5 requires rejection
Page contains no substantive research content - only an index of paper titles and authors
Published_at is blank and individual papers date to 2017 or earlier, making content stale relative to TODAY (2026-03-31)
Source cannot provide actionable market structure or macro catalyst insights as it is merely an archive index
human_review_reason: The record's assessment is accurate and complete. The human review notes correctly identify this as a listing page that should be rejected per CORE RULE 5. Auto-rejection is appropriate.

corrected_fields.summary: This is a listing/navigation page for the New York Fed's Staff Reports series, an archive of technical working papers spanning 1995-2017. The page provides an index of papers organized by year with titles and authors, but does not contain the full text or substantive content of any individual paper. Some indexed papers relate tangentially to market structure topics (e.g., Treasury market liquidity indices, monetary policy implementation frameworks), but the source itself offers no actionable analysis.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source cannot serve as an archiveable research document because it is a navigation index. Researchers seeking market structure or macro catalysts content would need to access individual Staff Reports directly, not this listing page. The archive contains relevant papers but this page does not deliver them.
